hero.tagline: Pick a product, tweak the design and print it in minutes. DobrePrinty ships across Poland.
hero.title: Great print. No compromises, without leaving the office.
hero.lead: Business cards, flyers, posters, banners, stickers and tees in offset-press quality. Configure, price live and order online.

faq.sub: The most common queries our customers ask, gathered in one place. Missing something? Write to us.
faq.helpSub: Support replies within 2 business hours. No chat-bots.

items.question: Can I order just one piece?
items.answer: Yes. Every DobrePrinty product can be ordered from a single piece, with no minimum order and no hidden fees for small runs. The price shown in the configurator is final (excluding VAT).

items.question: How long does an order take?
items.answer: Standard production is 2–5 business days depending on the product and quantity. You see the exact time in the configurator after choosing a format, and courier delivery adds another 24 hours after dispatch.

items.question: How much is shipping?
items.answer: Shipping costs 10 zł gross, and it's free for orders from 50 zł — whether you pick a courier or a parcel locker. The shipping cost is shown in the configurator and in the order summary before payment.

items.question: How should I prepare a print file?
items.answer: Ideally a PDF/X-1a in CMYK with 3 mm bleed and embedded fonts. For every product we provide a ready-made template (ZIP) and a PDF guide. Links are on the product page, below the configurator.

items.question: Do you prepare and check files for print?
items.answer: Yes — and it's included in every order. Print-ready file preparation and a technical check (size, color mode, bleed, resolution) are free. If we spot an issue, we apply minor technical fixes, and when your decision is needed we pause production and contact you before starting the run. You never pay extra for print preparation.

items.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: BLIK, card (Visa/Mastercard), Przelewy24, Apple Pay and Google Pay. Business customers can use a pro-forma invoice with 14-day deferred payment after company verification.

items.question: What if colors don't match my monitor?
items.answer: We print in the FOGRA39 / ISO Coated v2 profile, the industry standard for offset and digital print. Monitors show RGB while print is CMYK, so differences are natural. For exact color, order a proof print for 19 PLN.

items.question: Will I get a VAT invoice?
items.answer: Yes. After your order is finalized we automatically issue a VAT invoice and send it as a PDF to your email — no need to ask for one.

items.question: Can I cancel or return an order?
items.answer: Prints are personalised so they are not covered by the standard 14-day right of withdrawal. You can however cancel an order for free until your files enter production — just email support.

footer.tagline: Your order is fulfilled by a network of 28 verified partner print shops, audited quarterly for print quality and on-time delivery.

testimonials.sub: Every review below comes from Trustpilot and reflects a real order. No staging, no hidden comments.

items.title: 1000 business cards, express
items.quote: Zamówiłem 1000 wizytówek. Nie dość, że chłopaki poprawili mi format za darmo, to jeszcze ekspresowo dostałem moje zamówienie. Super mega polecam z całego serducha!
items.name: Gett Nacjs

items.title: Professional and fast
items.quote: Profesjonalnie i szybko. Mimo że format wysłanego pliku był inny od tego zamówionego to chłopaki bez problemu go dostosowali, polecam!!!
items.name: Pessi Ronaldo

items.title: Great service
items.quote: Świetna obsługa, dotrzymali terminu. Pełen profesjonalizm.
items.name: Cezary Jakub Prusak
